-    def generate_square_subsequent_mask(sz):

-        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(sz, sz), diagonal=1)

+    def generate_square_subsequent_mask(sz, device):

+        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(sz, sz, device=device), diagonal=1)

         mask = mask.masked_fill(mask == 1, float('-inf'))

         return mask

-            new_scores = new_scores.view(B, -1)

-            beam_indices = top_indices // log_probs.size(-1)

-            scores = top_scores

             if finished.all():

-def evaluate_exprate_greedy(model, loader, device, pad_id, eos_id, vocab_inv, sos_id):

+def evaluate(model, loader, device, pad_id, eos_id, vocab_inv, sos_id):

     model.eval()

     correct = 0

     total = 0

+    total_loss = 0.0

+    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=pad_id)

     with torch.no_grad():

         for imgs, tgt, _ in loader:

             imgs = imgs.to(device)

+            tgt = tgt.to(device)

+            tgt_input = tgt[:, :-1]

+            tgt_output = tgt[:, 1:]

+            with autocast():

+                memory = model.encoder(imgs)

+                tgt_mask = HMERModel.generate_square_subsequent_mask(tgt_input.size(1), device)

+                tgt_pad_mask = (tgt_input == pad_id)

+                out = model.decoder(tgt_input, memory, tgt_mask=tgt_mask, tgt_key_padding_mask=tgt_pad_mask)

+                loss = criterion(out.reshape(-1, out.size(-1)), tgt_output.reshape(-1))

+            total_loss += loss.item() * imgs.size(0)

+

             preds = model.predict(imgs, sos_id, eos_id)

             for p_seq, t_seq in zip(preds, tgt):

                 p_tokens = []
